testcase.name: @BeforeClass ConfigureAppium
testcase.failure: org.openqa.selenium.SessionNotCreatedException: Could not start a new session. Response code 500. Message: Could not find a connected Android device in 20000ms Host info: host: 'FEIDIAS1999-LAP', ip: '192.168.0.6' Build info: version: '4.43.0', revision: 'dd0f534' System info: os.name: 'Windows 11', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '25.0.2' Driver info: io.appium.java_client.android.AndroidDriver Command: [null, newSession {capabilities=[Capabilities {appium:app:
